Kanban

Danny + Hermes

Projects
D+H
🔍

#daniel-search

Personal portfolio search experience

Suggestions

35

Add 'At a Glance' credibility bar

H

Horizontal micro-stats row below hero: years coding, projects shipped, current role, focus area. Pill/badge style.

social-proofhomepage

Add external links to project cards

H

Render href (live demo) and repo (GitHub) links on ItemCard. Arrow + GitHub icons. Hover: muted → foreground.

social-proofprojects

Add 'Currently At' Amazon badge

H

Small pill near hero: 'Currently: GM Assistant @ Amazon · Miami, FL'. Briefcase icon optional.

social-proofhomepage

Add 'Built with' tech logo strip

H

Horizontal strip: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, Vercel, Local LLMs. Grayscale, muted opacity, hover full.

social-proofhomepage

Add quantifiable metrics to descriptions

D

Update data.ts with numbers: '500+ daily interactions', '$X/month processed', '95+ Lighthouse'.

social-proofcopy

Add testimonial / endorsement section

D

Blockquote with third-party quote. Left border foreground, italic muted. Even one quote beats zero.

social-prooftestimonials

Add aria-labels to icon-only buttons

H

Hamburger, close, and 'New Task' icon-only buttons have no aria-label. Screen readers can't identify them.

a11ynav

Link form labels to inputs via htmlFor

H

Modal form labels are not linked to inputs. Add htmlFor/id pairs for accessibility.

a11yforms

Add focus trap to modal

H

Modal does not trap focus — Tab escapes into background content. Implement focus trap for keyboard users.

a11ymodal

Add non-color priority indicators

H

Priority communicated by color dot only. Add text label or aria-label for screen readers.

a11ycards

Remove autoFocus from homepage search

H

autoFocus on landing page steals focus from screen reader landmark navigation (WCAG 2.4.3). Remove or keep only on /search.

a11yhomepage

Fix heading hierarchy on homepage

H

Homepage has h1 then jumps to no h2 for 'Featured' section. Add h2 (visually hidden if needed) for proper outline.

a11yheadings

Add viewport export

H

No mobile viewport meta declared. Add export viewport with width=device-width, initial-scale=1.

perfmobile

Replace img with next/image in Nav

H

Nav uses raw img without width/height. Use next/image for LCP and Lighthouse score improvement.

perflcp

Pause search glow animation when off-screen

H

Infinite conic-gradient animation on search bar runs on every page. Use IntersectionObserver to pause when off-screen or not focused.

perfanimation

Optimize searchItems and category filtering

H

searchItems is O(n*m) string concat. categories iterates whole items per category. Pre-index or use Object.groupBy.

perfsearch

Add real href/repo links to all project items

H

Every Item.href is undefined. Portfolio without GitHub/live-demo links reads as vapor. Add repo and href to every item, render both in cards.

social-prooflinks

Add GitHub embed with star counts and languages

H

Surface live GitHub data on homepage: star counts, language chips, last-commit recency. Live data > static descriptions.

social-proofgithub

Create case study pages /projects/[id]

H

Each project should have a dedicated page with screenshots, problem/approach/result narrative, tech stack, and links. Currently gallery is just paragraphs.

social-proofcase-study

Add OG images and opengraph-image.tsx

H

Sharing URL on LinkedIn produces blank card. Add opengraph-image.tsx for rich social previews.

social-proofseo

Add robots.txt and sitemap.xml

H

Next.js makes both one-liners. Essential for SEO and crawler indexing.

seositemap

Add analytics (Vercel or Plausible)

H

Track which projects get traffic. Signals site is maintained. Recruiters care about active portfolios.

analyticstracking

Add contact CTA above the fold

H

Email buried in /about and /resume. Add small footer/header CTA: email + GitHub + LinkedIn visible on every page.

social-proofcontact

Add 'Currently building' activity signal

H

Line under hero showing most recent commit or pinned note. Signals site is alive and actively maintained.

social-proofactivity

Add testimonials / press / talks section

D

Even one quote lifts credibility disproportionately. Add blockquote section with left border.

social-prooftestimonials

Add /ask graceful degradation + example output

H

When API breaks, show precomputed example exchange. Currently shows 'Something went wrong' with no context.

uxask

Add resume PDF download button

H

Recruiters paste resumes into ATS. Make it trivial with a 'Download PDF' button next to resume title.

social-proofresume

Add JSON-LD Person schema

H

Free SEO wins for 'Daniel Silva Perez'. Add structured data in layout.tsx.

seoschema

Add ⌘K / '/' keyboard shortcut for search

H

Portfolio with search bar should support keyboard shortcut. The ↵ kbd hint teases affordance not delivered.

uxkeyboard

Add live autosuggest as you type

H

Search has no autosuggest. With 9 items it's instant to filter live with highlighted matches.

uxsearch

Add custom not-found.tsx page

H

Given broken nav links, a custom 404 with search bar and links home is essential. Currently falls back to generic Next.js 404.

ux404

Add manual theme toggle

H

Dark mode only via OS preference. Many users want manual toggle (recruiters on managed laptops locked to light).

uxtheme

Enhance footer with social links + 'Built with'

H

Footer is single line. Add GitHub, Email, LinkedIn, 'Built with Next.js', source code link to this repo.

uxfooter

Show hover arrows always on mobile

H

Hover-only 'open in new tab' arrow invisible on touch. Show always on mobile or use persistent icon.

uxmobile

Increase mobile tap targets to 44px

H

Mobile nav tap targets are ~40px. WCAG recommends 44px minimum. Bump py-2.5 to py-3.

uxmobile

Ready

6

Fix broken nav links — 404s for half the nav

H

CRITICAL: Nav.tsx links to /apps, /research, /code — none exist. Homepage category pills also route to dead pages. Every visitor hits 404. Either create routes or remove links.

bugnav

Fix invalid Tailwind class pb-env(safe-area-inset-bottom)

H

layout.tsx uses pb-env(...) which is not valid Tailwind v4. Use pb-[env(safe-area-inset-bottom)] arbitrary value instead.

bugcss

Fix theme-color metadata API

H

theme-color set via metadata.other is wrong API. Use export viewport with themeColor array for light/dark variants.

bugmetadata

Verify /api/ask endpoint exists or add graceful fallback

H

ask/page.tsx POSTs to /api/ask but no route found. Page silently errors. Either create the API route or show 'Coming soon' UI instead of fake-loading.

bugapi

Fix searchItems running twice per render

H

search/page.tsx calls searchItems(q).length AND SearchResults child calls searchItems(q) again. Pass results down or useMemo.

bugperf

Fix Suspense boundary that never shows fallback

H

SearchResults is async but searchItems is sync — Suspense never triggers. Use loading.tsx or actually defer work.

bugsuspense

In Progress

0
Drop here

Review

0
Drop here

Completed

0
Drop here
